features: PURE & GENTLE FOR BABY’S DELICATE SKIN At Huggies, we know your top priority is keeping your little one healthy and happy. Huggies Pure baby wipes are soft and gentle, made from 100% naturally derived fibres and are designed to provide better cleaning to care for sensitive skin from day one.
REBALANCE SKIN pH New Huggies wipes don’t just clean, they help protect against causes of skin irritation and rebalance skin pH
12 PACKS, 576 WIPES – READY FOR EVERYDAY FAMILY LIFE Each pack contains 48 wipes, with 4 bags of 3 packs, giving you a total of 576 wet wipes to support your daily routine.

FRAGRANCE FREE & HYPOALLERGENIC FOR SENSITIVE SKIN Clinically and dermatologically tested, these fragrance free wipes are approved by the British Skin Foundation and safe for even the most sensitive skin.
SUITABLE FOR NEWBORNS, TODDLERS & EVERYDAY USE Whether it’s mealtime, playtime or nappy changes, these baby wipes are perfect for hands, faces and bottoms from day one.
PLASTIC FREE WIPES Made with 100% naturally derived fibers and 0% plastic
description: Product Description At Huggies® we know your top priority is keeping your little one healthy and happy. Soft and gentle on your delicate baby’s skin, our new Huggies® Pure baby wipes are 0% plastic. They are made from 100% naturally derived fibers and infused with 99% pure water. Huggies® Pure are fragrance free, hypoallergenic, clinically & dermatologically tested, approved by the British Skin Foundation. Better cleaning, soft and gentle on your delicate baby’s skin Safety Warning For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. Keep away from naked flame or direct heat sources.
